feedback.suggested_alternative_design: Remain with a user-level A/B test rather than a phased rollout because the treatment is user-targeted and easy to randomize.

what_changed: Added gross margin and subsidy guardrails
Clarified user-level targeting and eligibility rules

final_brief.experiment_name: Free Delivery Banner For Repeat Customers
final_brief.business_problem: Repeat customers may abandon purchase because delivery cost remains a conversion friction point.
final_brief.hypothesis: Showing a free delivery banner to eligible repeat customers will improve purchase conversion by reducing perceived delivery friction.
final_brief.target_segment: Logged-in repeat customers with at least 2 purchases in the prior 90 days.
final_brief.expected_effect: 1.5% to 3.0% relative lift in purchase conversion rate
final_brief.success_criteria: Positive conversion impact with no unacceptable margin deterioration or refund-rate increase.

review_summary.instrumentation_readiness: Sufficient after event-level exposure logging was added.
